name: github_reset_app_token
description: PATCH /applications/{client_id}/token — reset OAuth token; response includes new token (200; invalid → 404). Required: client_id, access_token (sensitive). Typically needs OAuth/GitHub App client credentials, not a Bearer PAT.

client_id.description: The client ID of the GitHub app.

access_token.description: The access token of the OAuth or GitHub application. Sensitive; do not log.
